seoTitle: Cumberland Park vs Cungena — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cumberland Park and Cungena. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cumberland Park vs Cungena: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cumberland Park and Cungena.
heading: Cumberland Park vs Cungena — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cumberland Park, South Australia and Cungena, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cumberland Park has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Cungena (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cumberland Park or Cungena safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cumberland Park has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Cungena scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cumberland Park scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Cungena scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cumberland Park or Cungena?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cumberland Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
